findings: QUIET TICK #4 (consecutive): zero trades in the 14:00 → 14:30 window. Strategy has been silent for ~137 minutes (2h17m) since the COALINDIA BUY at 12:13:31. Position sizing: NESTLEIND remains largest at 12.06% (2.94 pp buffer to 0.15 cap). Other 6 names range 4.71% to 7.91%. No single name approaches per-name cap. Concentration risk on a per-name basis is mild and well-distributed.

All 7 risk overrides remain materially tighter than base config and binding-but-not-breached. Post-rotation portfolio profile holds: deployment well inside cap, broad sector diversification across 6 sectors, no single-name dominance, modest realized loss inside buffer, and strategy demonstrated SELL-before-BUY discipline earlier in the session (3 SELLs at 11:16-11:44 → 1 BUY at 12:13 — net cash freed of ~₹84,521 less the COALINDIA ₹46,900 commitment).

Disciplined call: NO override change. None of the 14:00 carry-forward spec-hard triggers (a)-(h) have fired in the 14:00 → 14:30 window. Trigger (i) fires INFORMATIONALLY only (4th consecutive quiet tick). Trigger (h) leg-1 partial-fires but the composite is not yet complete. A fourth consecutive quiet tick with bit-identical state and a now-clear one-shot-rotation read cannot motivate a state change in the override file. Tightening on a session-end quiet tape would be theatrical and would punish exactly the disciplined-pause behavior the framework wants to reward.

Risk level LOW (unchanged from 14:00). Composite distress meta-trigger dormant on all 3 legs: realized P&L well inside 3% gate (4.0x buffer), no single-name distress visible at the cost-basis snapshot level, strategy silence (137 min) within 'normal pacing' band (< 180 min). The Day-2 'extended silence' regime that motivated earlier escalations was 24h+; the current 137 min is benign by comparison and consistent with a strategy that has executed its rotation thesis and is monitoring rather than re-entering.

Carry-forward triggers RE-ARMED for 15:00 tick (last regular-session tick before 15:30 close — calibrated to session-end posture): (a) if strategy admits a 2ND new BUY in PSU/utility-energy thematic by 15:00, OR thematic exposure crosses 22% on full fill — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND consider max_sector_pct 0.22 → 0.20 (latter creates grandfathered breach on Power on full fill — step carefully); (b) if a NEW BUY lands in BFSI specifically — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67; (c) if MAHABANK / TORNTPOWER / HINDUNILVR are re-bought (already-recycled names within 24h) — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND log explicit cluster-recycle flag; (d) if realized loss extends past -1% (₹9,956 — additional ₹3,992 needed) — fire daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025; (e) if TATAPOWER fills AND a 2nd new BUY lands the same window — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 to re-tighten admission cadence; (f) if all 3 day-stale OPEN orders remain OPEN at 15:00 with no cancel/reprice activity AND zero further strategy trades through 15:00, PROMOTE order-hygiene observability into a system_prompt feedback note (not a numeric lever) — this is now the most likely trigger to fire next given the persistence pattern; (g) if strategy resumes BUYing AT THE SAME CADENCE as Day-1/Day-4 (≥3 BUYs within a 60-minute window) — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 AND min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67; (h) RE-ARMED: if strategy silence extends past 3 hours (still no trade by 15:13) AND HINDZINC also crosses 28h-stale (≥14:43) — escalate to soft observability log of compounded behavioral drag (not a numeric lever); (j) NEW SESSION-END TRIGGER: if state remains bit-identical at 15:00 (5th consecutive quiet tick), defer ALL override re-evaluation to the EOD review at 16:00 — current overrides are calibrated for an active-rebalance regime; a session-end review with a settled book is the right time for a strategy-agent-led posture audit, not a risk-monitor numeric tweak.
